home.title: BUJÓNS ELECTROTÈCNICS S.L.
home.subtitle: Experience, precision and trust. Electrical solutions for industrial and professional environments.
home.service1_desc: Hydraulic and pumping installations. Energy and technical consulting. Electrical projects. Thermographic studies.
home.service2_desc: Low voltage. Commissioning and maintenance of fire protection systems. Pressure equipment: installation, repair and maintenance.
home.service3_desc: KSB ITUR technical service. Assembly and repair of industrial electronic equipment. AC and DC motor winding.

company.title: Company
company.subtitle: Our team and our history
company.team_p1: Our projects are carried out with multidisciplinary teams and, when necessary, with the collaboration of renowned external researchers. This combination allows us to approach each challenge with a comprehensive and results-oriented perspective.
company.team_p2: At BUJÓNS ELECTROTÈCNICS S.L., we have competent, committed and experienced professionals, trained in the latest technologies and quality procedures. We share a clear work culture: technical rigor, safety, and proximity to the client.
company.team_p3: At the head of the company is Miquel Bujóns Bach, industrial technical engineer and managing director, who drives the continuous evolution of the organization and its vocation of service.
company.history_p1: The company was founded in 1936 by Mr. Miquel Bujóns Calvet, focusing on the repair and installation of electric motors and the electrical part of automobiles. The workshop was located in the historic Plaça d'Anselm Clavé —today Plaça Triangular— and remained active throughout the Civil War years.
company.history_p2: From 1945, automotive electrical work was abandoned to fully dedicate to the repair and assembly of electric motors and pump groups, under the direction of Francesc Bujóns.
company.growth_p1: In 1998, the company transformed into a Civil Society, formed by Francesc Bujóns and his son Miquel Bujóns Bach (Industrial Technical Engineer), the latter assuming the position of managing director.
company.growth_p2: In parallel, the move to its own premises on Vicenç Dauner Street took place, just 200 meters from the previous location. The new space, larger, incorporates digital control and measurement equipment for motors and a very complete test bench for pump groups.
company.consolidation_p1: Over the years, we have expanded our capabilities and services to meet the needs of the industry: consumption rationalization studies and reactive compensation, electrical projects, industrial installations, and repair and assembly of industrial electronic equipment.
company.consolidation_p2: Finally, in 2007, the company transformed into a Limited Liability Company and consolidated its trajectory under the name we are known by today: BUJÓNS ELECTROTÈCNICS S.L.

products.title: Products & Services
products.subtitle: Consulting · Installation · Maintenance · Legalization
products.how_desc: At BUJÓNS ELECTROTÈCNICS S.L., we are characterized by a wide range of services with a 360º approach: diagnosis and technical consulting, installation and commissioning, maintenance and legalization. We work with top-level brands and proven procedures to guarantee safety, efficiency and availability of equipment.
products.cat1_s1_desc: Consulting with the most recognized brands in the market. Equipment selection, dimensioning and optimization.
products.cat1_s2_desc: Audits, efficiency strategies and improvement proposals with return on investment.
products.cat2_s1_desc: Engineering, reports, calculations and construction management.
products.cat2_s2_desc: Lines, protections and low voltage panels, as well as industrial water installations.
products.cat2_s3_desc: Commissioning, maintenance and repair. Accredited and authorized company.
products.cat3_s1_desc: Preventive and corrective, with safety protocols and incident traceability.
products.cat3_s2_desc: Diagnosis, on-site or workshop repair, testing and final validation.
products.cat3_s3_desc: Sale, repair and maintenance of electro-generators.
products.cat3_s4_title: Assembly and repair of industrial electronic equipment
products.cat3_s4_desc: Board, control and power · Calibration and functional verification.
products.cat4_s1_desc: Authorized and accredited company for pressure equipment.
products.cat4_s2_desc: Document management and processing with competent bodies.
products.cat5_s1_desc: Preventive detection of anomalies in panels and lines. Correction proposals.
products.cat5_s2_desc: Regulatory inspections and issuance of technical reports.
products.cat6_desc1: Official technical service for KSB ITUR equipment: diagnosis and repair, spare parts supply and commissioning.
products.cat6_desc2: Experience and access to technical documentation and manufacturer procedures.
products.final_desc: We respond quickly and with technical criteria. We will prepare a proposal tailored to needs and regulations.
